Un desastre el cafe un ascooooo,lo que menos tenía era gusto a cafe. Siempre pasa lo mismo ahí aguado mal!!! Y carooooo. Nunca más compro algo ahí!!!!

The coffee was a disaster, disgusting. The last thing it tasted like was coffee. It always happens there, watered down badly!!! And expensive. I'll never buy anything there again!!!!
